name: rego_lookup
description: Takes an Australian vehicle registration plate and returns make, model, year, colour and state of registration. Saves the customer having to spell out their vehicle details.
requires: NEVDIS API access (National Exchange of Vehicle and Driver Information System) — requires AUSTROADS membership or a reseller such as RedBook Check, VehicleCheck.com.au, or CarHistory
Fallback: ask caller verbally for make/model/year if API unavailable
el_call_timing: Invoke after caller provides their rego plate number
notes: NEVDIS direct access requires state/territory agreements. Practical path for most workshops: integrate a paid reseller API (RedBook Check ~$0.50/lookup, CarHistory ~$0.40/lookup). Include plate and state in request for best accuracy. NSW and VIC plates are nationally unique; QLD/SA/WA may have duplicates across states.
